/X  PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND INFORMATION TO ADD COUNT 4, 11377(A)HS, A MISDEMEOR/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:4/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA/CAL:PC 995 MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE INFORMATION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/GRTD:AS TO COUNTS 1 AND 2  /
